name: burrow-toml-schema
description: burrow.toml is parsed via smol-toml + Zod (BurrowTomlSchema) in src/schemas/burrow-toml.ts; loader is src/config/burrow-toml-loader.ts which returns null when absent and throws ValidationError when malformed. Every section is .optional() at the top level so an empty file is valid; sections themselves are .strict() to surface unknown-key typos. [[agents]] entries reuse AgentConfigSchema.partial() with id required so they can patch a built-in (id-only) or define a new declarative runtime (full row).
